skipRules: SKIP SELL signal when EMA Trend is 'bullish' regardless of RSI level
SKIP SELL signal when RSI is 41.0 to 41.5 AND EMA Trend is 'bullish'
SKIP SELL signal when RSI is 28.5 to 29.6 AND the trade results in a drawdown deeper than -1.90
SKIP SELL signal when RSI is 34.0 to 35.0 AND EMA Trend is 'bullish'
proceedRules: PROCEED with SELL signal when RSI is 35.0 to 40.0 AND EMA Trend is 'bearish'
PROCEED with SELL signal when RSI is below 30.0 AND EMA Trend is 'bearish' (provided RSI is not in the 28.5-29.6 danger zone)
corrections: Filter out all SELL signals occurring during bullish EMA Trend periods to improve win rate
Implement a RSI floor of 30.0 for SELL signals to avoid oversold-reversal losses
GBPUSD.summary: The strategy suffers from taking SELL signals during bullish EMA trends; filtering these out significantly improves performance.

skipRules: SKIP when EMA Trend is 'bullish' AND RSI is greater than 56.5
SKIP when EMA Trend is 'bearish' AND RSI is between 48.0 and 52.5 (excluding anomalies)
SKIP when RSI is between 59.5 and 60.0 regardless of other indicators
proceedRules: PROCEED when EMA Trend is 'bullish' AND RSI is between 53.0 and 55.5
PROCEED when EMA Trend is 'bearish' AND RSI is near 48.0 (specifically 48.0-48.7 range)
corrections: Filter out long signals when RSI enters the 'overbought' territory above 56.5 in a bullish EMA trend, as this is currently generating high-frequency losses.
Abandon 'buy' signals when the EMA trend is bearish, as the win rate on these signals is statistically negligible compared to the loss magnitude.
USDJPY.summary: Current strategy suffers from over-trading in 'bullish' EMA trends when RSI is elevated (56.5+), resulting in consistent losses.

skipRules: SKIP all SELL signals when RSI is between 50 and 55 AND MACD is positive
SKIP all BUY signals when EMA trend is bearish regardless of price position
SKIP all signals where Price is below EMA20 AND MACD is negative
SKIP all BUY signals when RSI is above 50 and Price is above EMA20
proceedRules: PROCEED with BUY signals only when EMA trend is bullish AND RSI is below 45
PROCEED with SELL signals only when EMA trend is bearish AND RSI is above 65
corrections: Filter out all PROCEED signals where RSI is in the 45-53 range, as these contribute significantly to the 30.6% error rate
Require MACD to be in the direction of the EMA trend before allowing any PROCEED decision
XAUUSD.summary: The strategy suffers from low-conviction entries during range-bound RSI (45-55) and counter-trend EMA setups; restricting entries to trend-aligned extreme RSI levels will significantly improve performance.
